title: Spajanje Stringova Operatorom Plus-Jednako

solutions.name: script
solutions.contents:
let myStr = "This is the first sentence. ";
myStr += "This is the second sentence.";
solutions.seed:
let myStr = "This is the first sentence. ";
myStr += "This is the second sentence.";

tests.text: myStr treba da ima jedan razmak izmedju dva stringa.
myStr treba da ima vrednost stringa This is the first sentence. This is the second sentence.
tests.testString: assert(myStr === 'This is the first sentence. This is the second sentence.');

description:
Mozemo koristiti i operator += da spojimo string na kraj postojeceg stringa. To je korisno kada dugacak string delite u vise linija.

Napomena: Obratite paznju na razmake. Spajanje ne ubacuje razmake automatski, pa ih morate sami dodati.

Mfano:

let ourStr = "I come first. ";
ourStr += "I come second.";

ourStr sada ima vrednost stringa I come first. I come second..
instructions: Sastavite myStr u vise linija spajajuci ova dva stringa: This is the first sentence. i This is the second sentence. koristeci operator +=. Koristite += kao u primeru i obavezno ostavite razmak izmedju dva stringa. Prvo dodelite prvi string promenljivoj myStr, zatim dodajte drugi string.
